title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Max Healthcare International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Max Healthcare International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!
